name: GOLD ENTERPRISE GROUP INC
summary: . Corporate History Gold Entertainment Group, Inc. was originally incorporated in the State of Nevada on February 3, 1999 as a C corporation under the name ADVANCED MEDICAL TECHNOLOGIES INC. / CANADA. The fiscal year end is January 31st. On April 5, 2002, the Stock Exchange and Merger Agreement entered into between Gold Entertainment Group, Inc. and Advanced Medical Technologies, Inc. was filed with the Nevada Secretary of State.
